CREATE TABLE main_table (id UInt32, value Int32);
CREATE TABLE subquery_table (id UInt32, sub_value Int32);
SELECT * FROM main_table WHERE value != ALL (SELECT sub_value FROM subquery_table);
SELECT id FROM main_table WHERE value != ALL (SELECT sub_value FROM subquery_table WHERE sub_value < 15);
SELECT id, value FROM main_table WHERE value != ALL (SELECT sub_value FROM subquery_table WHERE sub_value > 10) AND id > 2;
CREATE TABLE extra_table (id UInt32, extra_value Int32);
SELECT id FROM main_table WHERE value != ALL (SELECT sub_value FROM subquery_table) AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM extra_table);
SELECT * FROM main_table WHERE (value != ALL (SELECT sub_value FROM subquery_table)) OR (id IN (SELECT id FROM extra_table WHERE extra_value > 10));
SELECT id, value FROM main_table WHERE value != ALL (SELECT sub_value FROM (SELECT sub_value FROM subquery_table WHERE sub_value >= 20) AS derived);
SELECT id FROM main_table WHERE value != ALL (SELECT DISTINCT sub_value FROM subquery_table WHERE sub_value < 25) AND id < 4;
SELECT id FROM main_table WHERE value != ALL (SELECT sub_value + 5 FROM subquery_table) AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM main_table WHERE value = 20);
